title: [LowerToHW] Add pragmas to multibit mux results
body:
This adds `/* synopsys infer_mux_override */`and `/* cadence map_to_mux */` to lowered results of multibit_mux. The pragma is encoded into verbatim op. 

Example:
```scala
circuit MultibitMux: 
  module MultibitMux :
    input a : UInt<1>[3]
    input sel : UInt<2>
    output b : UInt<1>
    b <= a[sel]
```
```verilog
module MultibitMux(
  ...
  wire _GEN;

  wire [2:0] _GEN_0 = {{a_2}, {a_1}, {a_0}};
  assign _GEN = _GEN_0[sel] /* cadence map_to_mux */;   /* synopsys infer_mux_override */
  assign b = &sel ? a_0 : _GEN;
endmodule

```
